commit.message:
Fix bracket-watch: 404 exits 1 (not yet available) not 2 (hard error)

- fetch_official_bracket.py: fetch_bracket_data() now returns (data, exit_hint)
  tuple; 404 → exit 1 (bracket not released yet, expected pre-Selection Sunday)
  instead of exit 2 (network error). main() propagates the hint correctly.
- bracket-watch.yml: use set +e / exit_code capture pattern so bash -e
  doesn't kill the step on exit 1; only re-raises on exit 2 (hard errors).
  Exit 1 logs a friendly message and sets bracket_found=false for next retry.

Fixes 6 consecutive bracket-watch failures caused by ESPN 404 pre-Selection Sunday.

commit.message:
Add conversation search endpoint (GET /conversations/search?q=)

Searches both conversation titles and message content by decrypting
server-side and matching against the query string. Returns matching
conversations with message snippets (±40 chars around match).

- OIDC auth required (per-user encryption key)
- Minimum 2 character query
- Returns: conversationId, title, updatedAt, messageCount, matches[]
- Each match includes: messageId, role, snippet, createdAt
- Sorted by most recently updated conversation

ci: add workflow_dispatch trigger to release workflow (#24)

Allows manually dispatching the release workflow with a tag input.
The workflow will create and push the tag from the current HEAD, then
proceed with the existing build and GitHub Release creation steps.

A job-level guard (github.actor != 'github-actions[bot]') prevents
the push-tag event (fired by this workflow pushing the tag) from
triggering a duplicate release run.

feat: add text/code file attachment support (#23)

Extend downloadFileAttachments (formerly downloadImageAttachments) to
accept text/* MIME types and 35+ common code/config file extensions
(TypeScript, Python, Go, Rust, Java, shell scripts, SQL, YAML, etc.)
that Discord may classify as application/octet-stream.

- Add TEXT_EXTENSIONS set for extension-based detection
- Add BARE_FILENAMES set for extensionless files (Dockerfile, Makefile, etc.)
- Add isAcceptedFile() predicate combining MIME and extension checks
- Rename function to downloadFileAttachments (deprecated alias kept)
- Update temp file prefix from discord-img- to discord-file-
- Update extension fallback: image→.png, text→.txt
- Update call sites in mention, ask, and chat handlers

Text files dragged onto a Discord message and sent with an @mention
are now forwarded to Copilot as file-path attachments, same as images.
Limits unchanged: 10 MB max, 5 files max.
